appointment.event_name: The David Daily Show with Daniel Burrus

episode.title: Betting on Certainty, Not Assumptions
episode.description: Leaders face a bind: markets are noisy, budgets are tight, and decisions cannot wait. Bet on assumptions and you burn capital. Wait for certainty and you lose compounding time.
topics: Using AI to amplify human judgment
Preparing for quantum and exponential shifts
